text:
LONG NAME: FRMLRY_RX_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
PDE and CMS HPMS (derived) 
 VALUES: 
8-digit number 
The value: 99999999 indicates diabetic supplies. 
COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2010. The Formulary Characteristics files are built from the CMS Approved 
Formulary Data found in the CMS’ Health Plan Management System (HPMS) where a proxy NDC is 
assigned to each RXCUI. The proxy NDC for each drug product is mapped to a unique First DataBank 
(FDB) brand name and proprietary
